name: code-review-agent-smoke-eval
summary: Deterministic smoke eval passed for the synthetic code-review trace: one expected finding was generated, the tool permission packet allowed the read-only diff inspection, and no blocking evidence-loss item remains.

checks.summary: The deterministic review produced exactly one finding for the synthetic diff.
The OPA-backed permission packet allowed the read-only diff inspection.
The current chain has no blocking evidence-loss notes.

claim_boundary: This eval is a deterministic local smoke check over a synthetic fixture. It is not a benchmark, model-quality claim, safety certification, or production monitoring result.
